Implementation integrity: registry/service/validators/contract/tests/README/validator-script and manifest agree on pack binding (upstream CP00-244, next CP00-246, next_subphase RP07.P02.M07.S04, gates H07/C07), requirements, and distribution. freezeCp245Result (service.js:1367) stamps every runtime/write/leak flag false (writes_product_state, dispatches_search/ocr/index/embedding/review/approval/integration_smoke_runtime, evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_audit_event, creates/updates_database_rows, reads/writes_object_storage, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, executes_command_runtime, writes_state_transition, persists_idempotency_key/workflow_attempt, performs_rollback/retry_runtime, leak_detected, permission_bypass_detected, exposes_blocked_claim_detail) while omits_unauthorized_data/customer_safe_errors_only are true. No fs/network/exec/DB side effects are introduced; factories return deeply frozen pure data.

Contract & drift: contracts/search-core-contract.json current_pack_id is CP00-245; the service_golden_head_descriptor, cp245_requirements, and cp245_no_write_attestation blocks are exact serializations of the factory outputs and are protected by assert.deepEqual drift guards in scripts/validate-rp07-search-core-contract.mjs, with historical_pack_bindings tail = CP00-245.

Authority & review hardening: the descriptor and validators.js (drift guards at ~2081–2085) hold claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, and human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; the Claude packet is read_only with allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob and forbidden_review_evidence blockers. Hermes appears only as descriptor/receipt metadata (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false everywhere), satisfying the deterministic-control-plane-only constraint. The review setup itself is valid per CP178+ hardening: readiness ready with auth_preflight passed (exit 0), 2177-byte prompt embedding no full diff/source, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob with no forbidden tools, and a present review schema.

Posture: manifest status is implemented_pending_review with production_ready=false, pack_level_claude_review.status pending, and valid_review_receipts empty — no premature production_ready or enterprise-trust claim. The pack is a production_ready_candidate pending the remaining downstream gates. The expected-but-absent downstream artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are produced after this review and are correctly not present yet; unrelated dirty files (the .docx, handoff note, ldip json) are preserved outside pack scope. command-evidence records required commands at exit 0 with post-review-gated commands deferred.

No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
